span.p:
Resolve + validate signature
signature_to_native_sig ⇒ accounting::Sig
(lollipop / uniform-sign / strip_signed_binds AST rewrites)

span.p:
ORDINARY lowering
normalize_ann_proc(P)
— emits NO fuel-gate node

div.style: color: rgb(0, 0, 0) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Normalized Par
≡ byte-identical to unsigned P ✓

span.p:
Reducer — per-COMM metering
one token per send / receive,
attributed to s's lane (s₀ collapse: one envelope lane)
